$description: Copy this template for each phase's runtime checkpoint. Embedded within data/status/{deal-id}.json under phases.{phase-name}

dependencies.$description: Phases that must complete before this one can start

agents.$description: Map of agent names to their status summary

agentListFormat: Array of { name: string, status: string, checkpointPath: string }

outputs.$description: Aggregated outputs from all agents in this phase

dataForDownstream.$description: Aggregated data from this phase that downstream phases need

reportPathDescription: Path to the phase report file: data/reports/{deal-id}/{phase-name}-report.md
resumeInstructions: Read agent statuses. Skip completed agents (use cached outputs). Re-launch failed agents with error context. Launch pending agents whose dependencies are met.
